defender_modifiers.name: BIOFEEDBACK
defender_modifiers.description: When an opponent lands a CRITICAL HIT, 50% of the damage will be reflected back.

defender_modifiers.name: CHICKS DIG SCARS
defender_modifiers.description: Gain permanent REGEN and ENRAGE when HIT with an attack that deals at least 10% MAX HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: DEVIL'S SNARE
defender_modifiers.description: Gain THORNS for 5 seconds for each HIT blocked by the opponent.

defender_modifiers.name: LIVE WIRE
defender_modifiers.description: While BLOCKING, gain a 50% chance when HIT to inflict STUN for 1 second.

defender_modifiers.name: EYE FOR AN EYE
defender_modifiers.description: Gain HASTE and inflict ARMOR BREAK for 10 seconds when HIT with an attack that inflicts more than 5% MAX HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: HOUSE ADVANTAGE
defender_modifiers.description: While at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE, gain 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second.

defender_modifiers.name: LET IT SNOW
defender_modifiers.description: [Water Element Fighters]: Gain ARMOR for 3 seconds when suffering a HIT that deals less than 1% MAX HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: POWER OF TWO
defender_modifiers.description: BLOCKBUSTERS are UNBLOCKABLE while the opponent has a fully charged BLOCKBUSTER.

defender_modifiers.name: DANGER ZONE
defender_modifiers.description: All attacks are UNBLOCKABLE when below 25% HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: INITIATIVE
defender_modifiers.description: Using a BLOCKBUSTER reduces the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 100%.

attacker_modifiers.name: ELDER SIGN
attacker_modifiers.description: When not at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE, take 100% bonus damage.

defender_modifiers.name: GET A GRIP!
defender_modifiers.description:
All THROWS are unbreakable.

Suffer no damage from opponent THROWS.

defender_modifiers.name: TRANSDUCER
defender_modifiers.description: HITS quickly build BLOCKBUSTER METER if the opponent is blocking.

defender_modifiers.name: FLASH POINT
defender_modifiers.description:
[Fire Element Fighters]: Gain permanent ENRAGE for every 15% HEALTH lost.

50% chance to inflict STUN for 4 seconds when landing a HIT that deals at least 10% damage.

defender_modifiers.name: STANDING TALL
defender_modifiers.description:
Gain REGEN every 3 seconds.

REGEN is removed when KNOCKED DOWN.

defender_modifiers.name: CONCRETE RESOLVE
defender_modifiers.description: Remove all DEBUFFS and gain permanent IMMUNITY when dropping below 50% HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: DON'T STOP ME NOW
defender_modifiers.description: Gain UNFLINCHING while DASHING FORWARD.

defender_modifiers.name: HALFTIME
defender_modifiers.description: Once per match, gain 5 stacks of REGEN for 6 seconds when dropping below 50% HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: UNCANNY DODGE
defender_modifiers.description: For every 10th combo HIT the opponent lands, gain HASTE for 10 seconds and 1 stack of EVASION.

defender_modifiers.name: DOUBLE TAP
defender_modifiers.description: Once per match, RESURRECT with 25% HEALTH after being dead for 10 seconds.

defender_modifiers.name: GONE WITH THE WIND
defender_modifiers.description: [Air Element Fighters]: Regain 25% HEALTH when TAGGING OUT. Whenever the opponent uses a BLOCKBUSTER, their SPECIAL MOVES are reset and their BLOCKBUSTER METER is reduced by 100%.

attacker_modifiers.name: RUPTURE
attacker_modifiers.description: While blocking, lose 20% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second.

defender_modifiers.name: JUICED UP
defender_modifiers.description: Gain permanent HASTE.

defender_modifiers.name: INERTIA
defender_modifiers.description: TAG-IN attacks are UNBLOCKABLE and grant UNFLINCHING for 5 seconds.

defender_modifiers.name: PUNCH THROUGH
defender_modifiers.description: Dash Attacks are UNBLOCKABLE.

defender_modifiers.name: EXQUISITE CORPSE
defender_modifiers.description:
Suffering a HIT while near a dead teammate grants THORNS for 15 seconds.

RESURRECT all teammates with 50% HEALTH when using a TIER 3 BLOCKBUSTER.

attacker_modifiers.name: INFECTED FLESH
attacker_modifiers.description: Suffer a 30 second DOOM when the opponent drops below 50% HEALTH.

defender_modifiers.name: O HOLY NIGHT
defender_modifiers.description: [Light Element Fighters]: RESURRECT with 25% HEALTH and FINAL STAND for 15 seconds after being dead for 60 seconds.

attacker_modifiers.name: OFF-TEMPO
attacker_modifiers.description: Suffer a random DEBUFF for 10 seconds for every 5 COMBO HITS.

defender_modifiers.name: JINX
defender_modifiers.description: Deal 100% bonus damage if the opponent has any active DEBUFFS.

attacker_modifiers.name: CALTROPS
attacker_modifiers.description: Suffer BLEED for 10 seconds when DASHING BACK.

defender_modifiers.name: ELECTRIC SHEEP
defender_modifiers.description: Gain a 10% chance when hit to inflict POWER SURGE for 10 seconds.

attacker_modifiers.name: SANITY'S REQUIEM
attacker_modifiers.description: Every 5 seconds, suffer a random DEBUFF (excluding STUN) for 10 seconds.

defender_modifiers.name: FINAL CURSE
defender_modifiers.description: When defeated, inflict the opponent with 3 DEBUFFS (excluding STUN) for 10 seconds.

defender_modifiers.name: SILENT NIGHT
defender_modifiers.description: [Dark Element Fighters]: When suffering a CRITICAL HIT, DISABLE the opponent's BLOCKBUSTERS for 10 seconds.
